title: i am speed
description: I constantly suffer from high speed
body:
this fabric/quilt 1.19.1 mod gives all living entities (mobs, monsters, the player, etc) zero drag.

enjoy.

Je souffre constamment de la grande vitesse

from v2.0.0 onwards, fabric api/qsl is no longer required


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/H8e2UbHQwDE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
